author: cms-sw
body:
Building git-lfs on riscv64 (under qemu) hangs.  As git-lfs provides binary distro git-lfs for all our support archs , so this PR proposes to use those. 

Also update `go` version to `1.26.11 and build it using go-bootstrap
title: go: updated to newer version; git-lsf use prebuild binary
